name: Lemon Ice Box Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add softened cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 9-inch pie dish.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set in the center.
6. Allow the pie to cool completely before refrigerating overnight.
7. Serve chilled.
